title: Transnational repression
body: "Some crimes directed by foreign states against individuals are referred to as ‘transnational repression’.  These crimes can take place physically and / or online and include:   harassment, including on social media online disinformation campaigns surveillance stalking physical violence or threats of physical violence attempts to force individuals to return to their country of origin assassination or assassination attempts   This list is not exhaustive, transnational repression can take many forms.  "
